title: Can I Show costs by project by month?
excerpt:
I set up a few project boards with employees and estimated hours over specific timeframes. I also added a rate number column and a formula for estimated cost. 
The workload widget works great. I can see the hours by week…

posts.author: cjsammon (chris sammon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I set up a few project boards with employees and estimated hours over specific timeframes. I also added a rate number column and a formula for estimated cost.

The workload widget works great. I can see the hours by week or month per person and drill in to see the hours by project. However, I’d like to see the total estimated cost spread by week or month in a similar manner.

It would be great if there was a table view or bar chart that can show the anticipated costs by Project and month. Based on the workload example, it seems like the platform can spread values over time by groupings. So, i imagine its within the capability of Monday.com to summarize costs in a similar way. I’ve seen a few similar questions on here, but I haven’t seen a specific answer. Any solutions would be appreciated!
